---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the limitation you are running
into. For example: "I have 10 Spaces across two displays and the grid doesn't
show them separately."

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? What are their trade-offs?

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other apps, etc.
